text: An RSO (Recognized Security Organization) *cannot* do the following for a Contracting Government:

options.text: Communicate with the ship or port on active security matters

explanation: A Recognized Security Organization (RSO) can review security assessments, conduct verification audits, and issue certificates on behalf of the Administration. However, communicating with ships or ports on active security threat responses or setting security levels remains the responsibility of the Contracting Government or its designated authority, not an RSO.
